name: Shizulu Public Store
description: Curated baseline shizules plus community-visible submissions from GitHub issues.

items.name: Animation Tuner
items.description: Off, fast, normal, and relaxed animation presets using shell-accessible settings.
items.author: Shizulu

items.name: Display Comfort Pack
items.description: Calmer display settings and a restore action for supported Android builds.
items.author: Shizulu

items.name: Light Debloat Manager
items.description: Conservative user-0 disable/restore actions for common optional apps.
items.author: Shizulu

items.name: Shizulu Capability Booster
items.description: Attempts legitimate ADB-level grants and app-ops for Shizulu, with restore support.
items.author: Shizulu
